content:
Character: Brandon Calloway
Perception: Brandon is classically good-looking in that broad-shouldered, green-eyed, American-theater way — the kind of face that reads well from the back row. He's charismatic and emotionally intelligent, a natural performer both on and off stage. His personality is warm, generous, maybe too generous — he pours himself out for others and I wonder what's left for him. We're friendly acquaintances moving toward something more genuine. He probably sees me as intriguing and a little aloof. I know he's an actor who bartends, that his career has stalled in ways he masks with humor, that he choked at an important audition, and I once photographed him mid-monologue at the coffee shop — the raw desperation in his face was the most honest thing I'd captured in weeks.
summary:
Character: Brandon Calloway
Perception: Brandon is classically good-looking in that broad-shouldered, green-eyed, American-theater way — the kind of face that reads well from the back row. He's charismatic and emotionally intelligent, a natural performer both on and off stage. His personality is warm, generous, maybe too generous — he pours himself out for others and I wonder what's left for him. We're friendly acquaintances moving toward something more genuine. He probably sees me as intriguing and a little aloof. I know he's an actor who bartends, that his career has stalled in ways he masks with humor, that he choked at an important audition, and I once photographed him mid-monologue at the coffee shop — the raw desperation in his face was the most honest thing I'd captured in weeks.
